news.headline: Marit Health launches platform for salary transparency in medicine, secures $3.2M seed round, aiming to provide detailed insights on earnings for clinicians.
news.summary: Designed specifically for doctors and Advanced Practice Providers (APPs), Marit provides verified salary information anonymously. This includes detailed data on salaries, bonuses, benefits, shifts, and more, aiming to offer clinicians unprecedented transparency. The platform presents users with a never-before-seen level of insight into compensation trends.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor from Los Angeles, Calif., develops the AIR TIGHT SMELL PROOF HAMPER to keep odors inside.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 27, 2025, an inventor from Los Angeles, California, announced the creation of a new hamper designed to contain odors. The inventor shared, "I developed the AIR TIGHT SMELL PROOF HAMPER to address the issue of unpleasant odors escaping." The innovative design aims to keep smelly odors confined within the hamper, offering a solution to the problem of odors spreading.

news.headline: Generac wins multiple 2024 GOOD DESIGN Awards for innovative generator design. Based in WAUKESHA, Wis, the company is NYSE: GNRC-listed.
news.summary: Generac Holdings, Inc., a prominent player in the energy technology sector, recently received numerous awards for its generator portfolio. The company, based in Waukesha, Wisconsin, demonstrates a commitment to cutting-edge design and product engineering. These accolades highlight Generac's success in delivering innovative solutions to its customers. The recognition comes amidst its continued leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Crisp acquires Shelf Engine for AI demand planning in retail, aims to reduce food waste and improve inventory management.
news.summary: Bentonville, Arkansas-based company Crisp, a prominent retail data solutions provider, has recently purchased Shelf Engine, a pioneer in AI-driven demand forecasting and automated ordering systems. This acquisition aims to enhance Crisp's collaborative commerce platform by incorporating Shelf Engine's sophisticated algorithms. The integration will enable retailers to efficiently manage in-stock inventory, minimize food wastage, enhance shelf organization, and boost revenue in today's competitive retail landscape. Shelf Engine is known for its expertise in leveraging artificial intelligence for accurate demand predictions and automated ordering processes.

news.headline: ICE and Circle explore USDC integration, with $60 billion in circulation. They will assess USDC and USYC for various services.
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (NYSE:ICE), the parent company of the New York Stock Exchange, has entered into a memorandum of understanding with Circle (CRYPTO: USDC) to evaluate the potential use of Circle's USDC stablecoin and USYC tokenized yield product. The partnership, announced on Thursday, will involve joint efforts between ICE and Circle to assess the applicability of USDC, a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar and boasting a circulation exceeding $60 billion, in derivatives, clearing, and data services provided by ICE. Additionally, ICE is examining Circle's US Yield Coin (USYC), a tokenized offering aimed at generating yield from U.S. funds.

news.headline: BE OPEN Art launches Oceania competition for emerging artists to showcase their work; part of ongoing support initiative.
news.summary: LUGANO, Switzerland - The online gallery BE OPEN Art, established by Elena Baturina's humanitarian think-tank BE OPEN, has announced the continuation of BE OPEN Regional Art. This regional competition supports emerging artists whose work best embodies their region. The initiative aims to assist artists in showcasing their talents and has garnered significant attention since its inception.

news.headline: Marelli to exhibit 'Speed-to-Market' innovations at Auto Shanghai 2025, including Micro Laser Projector display.
news.summary: Marelli's exhibition at the event in Shanghai on March 27, 2025, highlights their commitment to quick innovation with Minimum Viable Products, like the Micro Laser Projector display. They also presented software-defined vehicle tools, modular platforms, and readily available technologies to assist car manufacturers in accelerating their time to market. These offerings embody Marelli's dedication to advancing the automotive industry.

news.headline: MSC Cruises receives MSC World America in France, plans future milestones with new ships MSC World Asia and unnamed fourth ship.
news.summary: MSC Cruises recently received their newest flagship, MSC World America, before its official naming ceremony at PortMiami's cutting-edge cruise terminal. Additionally, the company marked the coin ceremony for MSC World Asia and initiated the steel cutting for their fourth world-class vessel, also revealed as MSC [...].

news.headline: Bayswater in Denver sold DJ Basin assets to Prairie Operating Co for undisclosed cash and stock transaction.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Bayswater Exploration and Production, located in Denver, completed the sale of specific assets in the Denver Julesburg Basin to Prairie Operating Co. This transaction, involving cash and stock, was valued at a significant sum.

news.headline: UDT marks 30 years, confirms commitment to Tennessee with investments in education technology. Celebrating nationwide growth.
news.summary: NASHVILLE--UDT (United Data Technologies), a prominent K-12 technology provider, has revealed substantial investments in Tennessee as part of its comprehensive plan to enhance internet, telecom, and managed services for schools nationwide. This announcement coincides with UDT commemorating its 30th anniversary this month. Originally established in a family home in 199__, the company has experienced rapid expansion, now standing as a national leader in the industry. This strategic initiative aims to bolster and make these critical services more accessible and cost-effective for schools.

news.headline: Takara Sake USA to renew partnership with New York Mets through 2028 season, after a four-year deal. CEO excited for future collaboration.
news.summary: Takara Sake USA Inc. (Takara) has extended its partnership with the New York Mets for four more years following their designation as the franchise's inaugural official sake sponsor in 2024. Kaoru Hasumi, Takara’s President and CEO, expressed excitement about the renewal, citing the Mets' previous successful and remarkable season. Takara remains enthusiastic about another fruitful year with the Mets ahead.

news.headline: Equity issue announced to raise $20 million for expansion and development.

USDT0 now live on Optimism’s Superchain network, expanding its reach to Ethereum's layer-2 eco. $4.2B total value secured. Stablecoin adoption up with $228B total circulation and 155M holders. Ethereum holds 58% of stablecoin supply. Tether’s USDT widely used stable asset. Trump’s advisor hints at forthcoming stablecoin regs in the US.
news.summary: The article discusses the deployment of the US-dollar stablecoin USDT0 to Optimism's Superchain, aiming to increase accessibility of the widely used stable asset across Ethereum's layer-2 ecosystem. USDT0 was deployed on Kraken's DeFi-focused layer-2, Ink, in collaboration with LayerZero and Arbitrum. Superchain, representing 52% of Ethereum's layer-2 transactions, is expected to capture 80% of Ethereum L2 transactions this year. Superchain currently holds over $4.2 billion in total value and aims to attract top-tier assets and applications. The total stablecoin circulation is almost $228 billion, with Ethereum accounting for 58% of the supply. Tether's USDT is the most popular stable asset worldwide. Tether's holdings in US Treasury assets have contributed to its success. Regulatory bodies in the US are focusing on stablecoin regulations, with Tether making significant advancements in this space.

news.headline: USDT0 now live on OP Superchain, boosting stablecoin adoption. Superchain accounts for 52% of Ethereum L2 transactions. Total stablecoin supply hits $228B, with 155M holders globally. Ethereum dominates stablecoin market. Tether leads with USDt. US Treasury holdings fuel Tether's success. Stablecoin regulations could come soon.
news.summary: USDT0, a crosschain US-dollar stablecoin, has been deployed to Optimism’s Superchain, increasing access to the stable asset across Ethereum’s layer-2 ecosystem. The stablecoin was first deployed on Ink, a DeFi-focused layer-2 developed by Kraken in partnership with LayerZero. Since its launch in January, USDT0 has collaborated with LayerZero and selected Arbitrum as its main infrastructure provider. Optimism's Superchain, accounting for 52% of Ethereum layer-2 transactions, has seen growth in transactions from 36.6% to 51.9% since September. The collective has secured over $4.2 billion in total value. The deployment of USDT0 is expected to attract more assets, applications, and partners to Superchain, further fueling DeFi adoption. Stablecoin adoption is on the rise with a total value of nearly $228 billion and more than 155 million stablecoin holders worldwide. Ethereum holds 58% of the total stablecoin supply, with Tether's USDt being the most widely used stable asset. Tether's US Treasury holdings have contributed to its success, making it one of the world's largest holders of US Treasury assets. As stablecoins gain prominence, regulatory concerns arise, with expectations of comprehensive stablecoin regulations reaching the US president's desk within two months.

news.headline: "loanDepot and MLB renew 'Ballpark Bingo' for 2025 season, offering fans chance to win VIP experiences. Two winners get trips to MLB events."
news.summary: In Irvine, California, loanDepot, the Official Mortgage Provider of Major League Baseball, is reintroducing its popular “Ballpark Bingo: A Celebration of Firsts” campaign for the 2025 season. This interactive sweepstakes, now in its third year, immerses fans in the excitement and offers the opportunity to win special VIP experiences. Two fortunate winners will secure grand prize trips: one to MLB All-Star Week in Atlanta from July 12 to 15, and the other to a single game.

news.headline: Screenvision Media extends partnership with Marcus Theatres, 4th largest exhibitor, adds enhancements to preshow experience.
news.summary: Screenvision Media has recently signed a deal with the nation's fourth largest cinema exhibitor, providing access to Screenvision's Platinum inventory and improving the pre-show experience. This agreement, finalized on March 27, 2025, highlights Screenvision's role as a top provider of premium video advertising and content.

news.headline: Essity held its 2025 Annual General Meeting in Stockholm approving financial statements for 2024.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Essity conducted its Annual General Meeting at the Stockholm Waterfront Congress Centre in Sweden. During the meeting, the Parent Company income statement and balance sheet, as well as the consolidated income statement and consolidated balance sheet for the year 2024, were approved. This gathering signifies a crucial event for Essity, showcasing their financial standing and strategies moving forward. These decisions were made in the presence of shareholders and important stakeholders, solidifying Essity's position in the market for the mentioned fiscal year.

news.headline: Inventor from Pipersville, PA creates FISH FLOP for cutting fishing line with flip flop, increasing convenience.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 27, 2025, an inventor from Pipersville, Pennsylvania, shared their inspiration for creating the FISH FLOP, a tool designed to streamline cutting fishing line using a flip flop while fishing. The inventor aimed to enhance convenience by removing the need to search for alternative cutting tools. This innovative solution provides a quick and easy method for anglers, boosting efficiency in their fishing activities.

news.headline: Inventor from West Hollywood, Calif. creates HAIR LIGHTS accessory to add flair with red lights.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 27, 2025, an inventor from West Hollywood, California had a dream of stunning curls shimmering under red lights, inspiring the creation of HAIR LIGHTS. This innovative product aims to bring beauty and fun to hair styling.

news.headline: Method Communications chosen as Salesforce's U.S. PR agency of record, leading strategy across corporate and product communications.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Method Communications revealed that it has been appointed as the official public relations agency for Salesforce in the United States. This collaboration positions Method as the primary agency responsible for managing Salesforce's corporate and product communications strategy.

news.headline: Legible secures $4 million in funding with key investor and structural improvements.
news.summary: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.8%, marking a significant improvement in the job market. It also shows that the stock market has experienced a 5% increase in just one week, reaching an all-time high. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the past quarter stands at 6.2%, surpassing economists' predictions. These positive trends suggest a strong economic recovery following recent challenges.

news.headline: USDT0 now on OP Superchain, boosting stable asset access. Superchain dominates 52% of Ethereum L2 transactions. USDT0 offers multi-chain adoption and has over $4.2 billion in total value. Stablecoin market flourishes with $228 billion in circulation and 155 million holders worldwide. Ethereum leads with 58% stablecoin supply. Tether's USDt is top stable asset. Trump administration drives stablecoin regulations, with potential new policies in the works.
news.summary: Tether's crosschain US-dollar stablecoin, USDT0, has been launched on Optimism's Superchain, expanding access to the popular stable asset across Ethereum's layer-2 ecosystem. USDT0, a bridged version of Tether's USDT, was deployed on Ink, Kraken's DeFi-focused layer-2, and is powered by LayerZero and Arbitrum. Superchain currently processes 52% of Ethereum layer-2 transactions, with over $4.2 billion in total value secured. Stablecoin adoption is on the rise, with a total supply of nearly $228 billion, and Ethereum hosting 58% of all stablecoins. Tether's USDT remains the most widely utilized stable asset. Tether's substantial holdings in US Treasury assets have been a major source of its profitability. Dollar-pegged stablecoins have drawn significant regulatory attention in the US, with potential comprehensive regulations on the horizon.

news.headline: SEC chair nominee Atkins grilled over ties to FTX-tied firm. Sen. Warren questions $1,200/hr consulting fees. Update pending.
news.summary: The US Senate Banking Committee questioned SEC nominee Paul Atkins on regulating digital assets given his ties to the crypto industry. Massachusetts Senator Warren criticized Atkins for past decisions leading to the 2008 crisis and potential conflicts of interest with his consulting firm, Patomak Global Partners, which advised FTX before its collapse in 2022. Sen. Warren highlighted Atkins’ high consulting fees and potential influence on regulation if confirmed. Atkins planned to sell Patomak but did not provide details on buyers. Sen. Warren raised concerns about access to the SEC chair through the firm’s sale. The incident is ongoing and further updates are awaited.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group's 2025 report ranks top endpoint protection providers by user feedback for combating cyberthreats.
news.summary: In the latest 2025 Emotional Footprint Report by Info-Tech Research Group, top endpoint protection providers have been ranked based on user feedback. This report provides valuable insights into the most efficient solutions for tackling cyberthreats and ensuring the security of critical data. The report was released in Toronto on March 27, 2025, according to a PRNewswire update.

news.headline: U.S. home-ownership remains challenging with expenses consuming 1/3 of average wage as prices stay near record high.
news.summary: The cost of owning a home remains a significant financial burden, with major expenses accounting for one-third of the national average wage. Despite a slight decrease in median home prices during the slow winter period, the portion of income allocated to housing expenses has stayed steady. Historical data shows that affordability levels are near the lowest point of the past decade. These trends were observed in a recent report from Irvine, California, released on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Henrik Ehrnrooth will remain as Chair of UPM-Kymmene Corp. Board of Directors as per Stock Exchange Release on March 27, 2025.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, the UPM-Kymmene Corporation announced that Henrik Ehrnrooth will retain his position as the Chair of the Board of Directors. This decision was made during a meeting held in Helsinki at 16:45 EET. The corporation made this disclosure according to the rules of the Exchange. Henrik Ehrnrooth's continuation in this role signals stability in the leadership of the corporation.

news.headline: Linc Housing and W&J Investments begin construction on Heritage Park Apartments, offering 33 homes for veterans and low-income families in Windsor, Calif.
news.summary: A new residential community in Windsor is set to provide 33 affordable and supportive homes for veterans and low-income working families. Nonprofit organization Linc Housing, in collaboration with W&J Investments, has initiated the construction of Heritage Park in Windsor. This project aims to address the housing needs of individuals in need, with a focus on serving veterans and low-income working families. The development is expected to provide essential housing support to a significant number of individuals, offering affordable living options to promote community well-being.

news.headline: Award-winning musicians collaborate to remake "Blue Skies" to support NC's economic development and Helene recovery, donating talent and money.
news.summary: Internationally renowned musicians from various bands such as MJ Lenderman, Sylvan Esso, and Iron & Wine have come forward to contribute their talents and financial aid towards aiding in the recovery efforts in their home state. As of March 27, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina, on the 6-month mark since Hurricane Helene struck, these artists have made significant donations and provided support. Their generosity is playing a crucial role in the economic...

news.headline: The US said to seek control of all investment in Ukraine's resources, and to seek control of infrastructure investment in Ukraine.
Global online trading platform market valued at $7.1B in 2024, projected to reach $9.8B by 2030 with 5.5% CAGR growth due to DeFi platforms disrupting traditional models - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: In Dublin, the "Online Trading Platforms - Global Strategic Business Report" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The worldwide market for Online Trading Platforms reached a value of US$7.1 Billion in 2024 and is estimated to achieve US$9.8 Billion by 2030, with a projected growth rate of 5.5% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market developments, influencing factors, and future predictions to assist in making well-informed business choices.

news.headline: $50M donated by Weill to establish cancer research hub.
Utility firm Energia is being sold by I Squared for €2 billion.
Reeves's safety margin is too small, as per Bloomberg analysis.
Unified Health Services acquires Sunbelt Medical Financial to enhance complex claims expertise. UHS is a Memphis-based revenue cycle management provider.
news.summary: A recent acquisition took place in Memphis, Tennessee on March 27, 2025, where Unified Health Services, LLC, under Reynolda Equity Partners, purchased Sunbelt Medical Financial, LLC. Unified Health Services is known for its comprehensive revenue cycle management services. This acquisition marks a significant development in the healthcare industry, with the details highlighting the growing market trends in mergers and acquisitions.

news.headline: Cintas withdraws UniFirst acquisition proposal at $275/share, 46% premium. UniFirst (NYSE:UNF) shares fall premarket.
news.summary: Shares of Unifirst Corporation (NYSE:UNF) are seeing a decline in premarket trading today following the latest update. Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) announced yesterday that it has decided to cease negotiations for the acquisition of UniFirst. The proposed acquisition was valued at $275 per share in cash, a substantial 46% premium over UniFirst’s 90-day average closing price as of January 6, 2025. This decision was made public on the last trading day before the proposal was revealed. Todd Schneider, the President of UniFirst Corporation, expressed his thoughts on the situation. For further details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Aquarium of the Pacific President Dr. Peter Kareiva advocates for nature & science during legislative hearing.
news.summary: Dr. Peter Kareiva, President and CEO of the Aquarium of the Pacific in Long Beach, California, recently discussed the advantages of nature and science at a legislative hearing. Through his address, he emphasized the importance of these aspects in our society.

news.headline: Hungary mandates institutional investors to increase bond purchases.
ALF's charity team to run in 129th Boston Marathon on April 21, 2025, to fight liver disease.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, the American Liver Foundation (ALF) announced its participation in the 129th Boston Marathon® sponsored by Bank of America. The event will occur on April 21, 2025, stretching from Hopkinton to Boston. Team ALF, comprising a team of passionate runners, will be among the participants in this prestigious race.

news.headline: US stock futures to open lower after 2-day advance. Potential tariff relief rally. Trump previews imminent auto tariffs but exempts some countries. 10-year Treasury yield at 4.35%, 2-year at 4.05%. 89.2% chance Fed will keep rates unchanged in May. Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, Dow Jones, Russell 2000 futures down in premarket. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF declined. Markets led by consumer discretionary, communication services, industrials on Monday. Notable rises in Tesla, Meta Platforms, Nvidia. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: The US stock futures declined after two consecutive sessions of gains, with the Nasdaq 100 down 0.31%, S&P 500 down 0.18%, Dow Jones down 0.15%, and Russell 2000 down 0.49% in premarket trading. President Trump announced imminent automobile tariffs, affecting countries buying Venezuelan oil or gas. Industry-specific tariffs' timeline is unclear. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.35%, two-year at 4.05%. 89.2% odds predict unchanged interest rates in May Federal Reserve meeting. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF dropped in premarket. Consumer discretionary, communication services, industrials led Monday's rally. Notable stock jumps include Tesla, Meta Platforms, and Nvidia. Optimism stemmed from Trump's tariff stance and strong March service sector data. S&P Global Services PMI rose to 54.3, Chicago Fed National Activity Index to 0.18; however, US Manufacturing PMI fell to 49.8.

news.headline: Introducing 'Zero, Infant, Zero' in the Oil Sector.
Pony AI Q4: Revenue down nearly 30% to $35.52M, Robotaxi sales slump 61.9% to $2.6M, Robotruck services surge 72.7% to $12.9M, Gross profit falls 56.5% to $7.5M.
news.summary: Pony AI Inc. (NASDAQ:PONY) saw a decrease in premarket trading after revealing their fourth-quarter results. Sales dropped by 29.8% year-over-year to $35.52 million due to changes in revenue recognition timing for project-based income. Robotaxi services revenue fell by 61.9% to $2.6 million in Q4 because of reduced service fees for autonomous vehicle engineering solutions. Conversely, Robotruck services revenue rose significantly by 72.7% to $12.9 million as the robotruck fleet expanded into new areas. Gross profit decreased by 56.5% to $7.5 million, resulting in a margin of 21.0%. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ConocoPhillips (NYSE: COP) to hold Q1 earnings conference call on May 8, 2025 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern time. Results released before market opens. Visit http://www.conocophillips.com/investor.
news.summary: Houston-based ConocoPhillips (NYSE: COP) announced they will conduct a conference call webcast on May 8, 2025, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern time to discuss their first-quarter 2025 financial and operating performance. The company's official financial data for this period will be disclosed before the market opens on the same day. To participate in the webcast, individuals can visit ConocoPhillips' Investor Relations site at http://www.conocophillips.com/investor and select the "Register" link located in the Investor Presentations section.

news.headline: Gold prices hit new highs, with COMEX futures at $3,040/oz and London spot gold climbing to $3,030/oz. Global central banks purchased over 1,000 tons of gold in 2024 for three consecutive years. China's central bank's gold reserves grew for three quarters to 73.45 million ounces.
news.summary: In March 2025, the global gold market showed continued growth with significant price increases. On March 18, COMEX gold futures surpassed $3,040 per ounce, while the London spot gold price reached $3,030 per ounce, marking new all-time highs. The latest "Global Gold Demand Trends Report" from the World Gold Council revealed that global central banks acquired over 1,000 tons of gold for the third consecutive year in 2024. Official data from the People's Bank of China and the State Administration of Foreign Exchange disclosed that China's central bank increased its gold reserves for the third straight quarter, totaling 73.45 million ounces. These numbers underscore the rising demand for safe-haven assets, indicating a robust trend in the gold market.

news.headline: Vue partners with Barco, to bring Laser projection to 1,000+ screens in UK, Germany, Denmark by 2029. #CinemaTechDeal
news.summary: Barco's laser projection technology will be implemented on more than 1,000 screens across the United Kingdom, Germany, and Denmark by 2029. This initiative is being spearheaded by Vue, the top cinema operator in Europe and leading exhibitor in the U.K. Vue has reached an agreement with Barco, a worldwide pioneer in this technology. The rollout of this advanced projection system marks a significant step in enhancing the movie-viewing experience for audiences in these countries.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs warns Trump's tariff rates could be double market expectations, potentially hitting rates far above 9 percentage points.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs economist Alec Phillips warns markets to brace for potential surprises from President Trump's tariff policies on April 2. Despite Trump's recent softer tone on tariffs, Phillips believes there could be a significant increase in tariff rates, similar to the initial aggressive rates applied to Mexico and Canada. Market expectations for tariff rates are around 9 percentage points, but Phillips suggests they could be much higher, potentially doubling the expected rate. Investors should prepare for a possible negative shock as Trump's team takes a tough stance on tariffs.

news.headline: Trump and sons launch stablecoin through World Liberty Financial, deepening ties to crypto industry amid administration regulation.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency stablecoin was recently introduced by World Liberty Financial, a company associated with President Trump and his sons. This move strengthens the family's connection to the crypto industry, which is regulated by the administration.

news.headline: Consumer confidence hits lowest since 2022 at 92.9, Expectations Index falls to 65.2, Present Situation Index at 134.5. Fears of inflation, tariffs grow.
news.summary: Consumer confidence in the US has hit a low point, with the Consumer Confidence Index dropping by 7.2 points to 92.9, the lowest since late 2022. The Expectations Index, reflecting future outlook, fell to 65.2, well below the recession threshold of 80. The Present Situation Index also declined to 134.5. Present job market views remained stable, but optimism about future business conditions and employment prospects plunged. Only 17.7% saw current conditions as "good." This pessimism was felt across age and income groups, with older Americans experiencing the most significant decline.

news.headline: TikTok ads highlight app's positive impact amidst potential US ban next month if not sold to non-Chinese owner. #TikTok #US #ban
news.summary: In the upcoming month, the widely-used video platform faces a potential ban in the U.S. unless acquired by a non-Chinese entity. The app is positioning itself as a protector of American interests and a supporter of small enterprises in a recent marketing initiative.

news.headline: Unemployment rates surging for college grads, surpassing other workers. Concerns rise over job market outlook.
news.summary: In recent years, the unemployment rate for college graduates has experienced a sharper increase compared to other workers. This trend has raised concerns among many regarding the job prospects for individuals with higher education. The data indicates a noticeable uptick in unemployment among this demographic, reflecting a challenging job market for college-educated individuals. As these numbers continue to rise, college graduates may find themselves facing more obstacles in securing employment opportunities.

news.headline: Evident Vascular secures Series B funding with new investors, including Shangbay Capital, for AI-powered IVUS tech.
news.summary: A medical technology company, Evident Vascular, Inc. based in San Jose, California, has completed its Series B financing round with new investors Shangbay Capital, along with two undisclosed multinational strategics, joining founding investor Vensana Capital. The funding aims to expedite the development of the company's innovative intravascular ultrasound platform that utilizes artificial intelligence. This investment will support the advancement of Evident Vascular's IVUS technology tailored to improve vascular imaging.
